GOOGLE ANNOUNCES EXPANSION OF AI PARTNERSHIP WITH ANTHROPIC
articles.summary: Google has expanded its partnership with AI safety startup Anthropic, leveraging Google's Cloud TPU v5e chips for AI, enhancing AI security and safety standards, and utilizing Google's technological infrastructure for large-scale data handling and analysis.

articles.title: COHERE LAUNCHES INDUSTRY-LEADING EMBED MODEL
articles.summary: The latest Cohere model is an upgrade for search applications that engage with real-world, noisy data and for retrieval-augmentation generation (RAG) systems. Its multilingual models now support 100+ languages and can be used to search within a language (e.g., search with a French query on French documents) and across languages (e.g., search with a Japanese query on Finnish documents).

articles.title: MICROSOFT HAS OVER A MILLION PAYING GITHUB COPILOT USERS
articles.summary: Microsoft's GitHub Copilot software saw a 40% rise in paid users in Q3, affirming CEO Satya Nadella's focus on AI integration across products. GitHub’s AI offering is fast gaining traction with "over 1 million paid copilot users in more than 37,000 organizations". These AI advancements contributed to a positive impact on Microsoft's Azure revenue.

articles.title: AUDIOCRAFT MUSICGEN NOW HAS STEREO GENERATION
articles.summary: Using a clever interleaving of left and right channels during fine tuning, these state of the art text to music models are brought from mono to stereo which doesn't improve benchmark scores but does improve the overall experience.

articles.title: A NEW HORIZON IN JAPANESE IMAGE CAPTIONING EVALUATION
articles.summary: Researchers have developed JaSPICE, a metric for evaluating Japanese image captions, addressing the gap where tools like SPICE did not exist for languages other than English.

articles.title: LANDMARK MATCHING FOR AUTONOMOUS VEHICLES
articles.summary: The RobustMat approach aims to improve how autonomous vehicles match landmarks under diverse conditions by using spatial information and neural differential equations.

articles.title: 🏠 IS THIS THE NEXT SMART HOME STAPLE?
articles.summary: Ring 一 Acquired by Amazon for $1.2B. Nest 一 Acquired by Google for $3.2B.

articles.title: If you missed out on those companies, now’s your chance: RYSE
articles.summary: is the tech firm poised to dominate the Smart Shades market and you can still invest at $1.25/share [12].

articles.title: GPTV EXAMPLES WITH ROBOFLOW
articles.summary: Roboflow is a computer vision toolkit that makes building applications easier with composable pieces of code. Now that GPT-4 Vision is in the OpenAI API, the Roboflow team has put together some demos of using it in conjunction with segment anything and DINO.

articles.title: PUNICA
articles.summary: Punica enables running multiple LoRA fine-tuned models at the cost of running one.

articles.title: A DUAL-STAGE APPROACH TO SHARPER TEXT-TO-VIDEO GENERATION
articles.summary: The new I2VGen-XL model tackles the challenges of video synthesis, such as maintaining semantic accuracy and clear, continuous imagery, by using a two-step process that separates semantic coherence from video quality enhancement. The first stage focuses on preserving content from static images, while the second stage refines details and resolution.

articles.title: IS AI THE NEXT CRYPTO?
articles.summary: The article analyzes 2 million Hacker News comments to compare the public sentiment towards AI and crypto. The study reveals trends in topic popularity and sentiment over time, showing AI's consistent prominence and a complex, fluctuating public opinion on both AI and crypto.

articles.title: FEAR WINS
articles.summary: Fear is driving regulatory approaches towards AI, with the US and UK initiating measures due to concerns about the long-term risks of AI. While some regulation is necessary, fear-driven decisions may lead to hasty and potentially detrimental regulations. Actions should not be dictated solely by fear.

articles.title: INFLUENCERS IN THE AGE OF AI: INNOVATE OR DIE
articles.summary: MyCompanions.AI aims to blend human influencers with AI, providing users an engaging and personalized experience. The platform plans to address predicted dominance of AI influencers and the flaws in existing platforms like Patreon. Promising features include custom role plays, strong contextual and conversational memory, and multimodal automation.

articles.title: 🆕 ZENDESK AI ALTERNATIVE FOR $10/MO SOLVES SUPPORT TICKETS
articles.summary: STYLO [19] is an AI assistant that lives inside every Zendesk ticket to solve your 10-MINUTE TICKETS IN 10 SECONDS. Customers get (correct) answers fast; agents do less gruntwork 🙌

articles.title: HUGGING FACE IS DEVELOPING CHATGPT-LIKE AI MODELS
articles.summary: AI startup Hugging Face's H4 team, formed in January, is focused on developing open source large language models and alignment techniques for AI-powered chatbots inspired by ChatGPT.

articles.title: AI COMPANIES HAVE ALL KINDS OF ARGUMENTS AGAINST PAYING FOR COPYRIGHTED CONTENT
articles.summary: A compilation of reasons from the biggest AI companies on why they shouldn’t have to pay for copyrighted content.

articles.title: COPYREMIX (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: CopyRemix uses AI to turn your user testimonials into full case study content.
